perf.acceptance_note: accepted gates lifecycle only (terminals, teardown, no poisoning); sample_output_checks are recorded numerics -- the E0hf gate run established that cross-path trajectory rms is dominated by discrete MoE route flips (within the 1-ulp eager control envelope), so it is not an acceptance criterion here.
perf.b_semantics: HC boundaries are replicated per-rank compute on local_batch rows; A5F single-GPU B corresponds to local_batch, not the global batch
